info.name: Source Bank API
info.description: Wallet System REST API — register, deposit, transfer, and view transactions.

response.name: Register — Short Password (400)
Register — Invalid Email (400)
Deposit — Invalid Amount (400)
Transfer — Below Minimum 50 (400)
Transfer — Missing recipientType (400)
Get Transactions — Default (User A)
